cards.title: '₹50 per Amazon review' tasks
cards.script: Pays small amounts (₹30–₹100) for liking videos / rating products. Once you trust the payouts, asks you to deposit money to 'unlock bigger tasks'. Deposit is never returned.
cards.example: Rate products on Amazon, ₹50 per task. Recharge ₹500 to unlock bigger tasks.

cards.title: '₹50 per YouTube like'
cards.script: Telegram or WhatsApp group offering ₹30–₹50 per like / subscribe. Entry stage of the merchant-task scam.
cards.example: Earn ₹50 per like on YouTube videos. Daily simple tasks. Join Telegram group.

cards.title: 'Merchant tasks' with deposit
cards.script: VIP / merchant task site with tiered payouts. To 'unlock' the next tier you must deposit a larger amount. Funds never withdrawable.
cards.example: Complete merchant task daily. Deposit ₹1000 to start, earn 30% returns. VIP group only.

red_flag_rules.red_flag: Real micro-task work never asks YOU to deposit money to 'unlock' bigger tasks. This is the 'merchant task' / 'prepaid task' scam. Initial small payouts are bait. Your deposit will never be returned.
'Like a video / rate a product for ₹50' jobs sent via WhatsApp / Telegram are the entry stage of the merchant-task scam. Even if first payouts come, the next stage will demand a deposit.

next_steps: Do not deposit any amount to 'unlock' bigger tasks. The deposit is never returned.
Stop all communication, leave any Telegram / WhatsApp groups they added you to, and block the contact.
If you have already deposited money: call 1930 immediately and file at https://cybercrime.gov.in. Faster reporting = better chance the bank can hold the transfer.
